name: Rearrange items in an unkeyed v-for (feature grid)
notes: The feature grid uses v-for WITHOUT :key intentionally (FeatureGrid.vue). Vue's diff treats reordered unkeyed nodes as new and remounts them by index — which means our edge-applied DOM reorder is reset against the original `features` array. Annotator scopes data-allow-mismatch='children' on the parent grid; the companion re-moves post-hydration.
